self_intro_zh:
我叫陳思遠，是一個熱愛學習、勇於挑戰的男孩。我在學業上追求卓越，尤其在數學和語文方面有濃厚興趣。課餘時間，我喜歡彈鋼琴、下圍棋和閱讀，這些愛好培養了我的專注力和邏輯思維能力。

我希望升讀貴校，是因為貴校深厚的文化底蘊和嚴謹的學術氛圍，能讓我在優良的環境中繼續成長。我期待在更廣闊的平台上展現自己，為學校社區貢獻力量。

學習目標：快速適應中學課程節奏，保持學業優異，積極參與課外活動。

規劃：短期適應中學生活；中期爭取優異DSE成績；長期升讀頂尖大學，成為具備中文素養和國際視野的人才。
self_intro_en:
My name is Ryan Chan, a boy who loves learning and embraces challenges. I pursue academic excellence, with a strong interest in mathematics and languages. In my spare time, I enjoy playing piano, Go, and reading, which have cultivated my focus and logical thinking.

I aspire to join your school because of its rich cultural heritage and rigorous academic atmosphere, which will allow me to grow in an excellent environment. I look forward to contributing to the school community on a broader platform.

My Goals: Adapt quickly to secondary school curriculum, maintain academic excellence, and actively participate in extracurricular activities.

My Plans: Short-term: adapt to secondary school life. Medium-term: achieve outstanding DSE results. Long-term: enter a top university and become a talent with Chinese literacy and international vision.

teacher_comment.comment_zh: 陳思遠同學品學兼優，數學能力突出，辯論表現出色。他待人有禮、樂於助人，在同學中有良好口碑。強烈推薦錄取。
teacher_comment.comment_en: Ryan is an outstanding student with excellent academic performance, particularly in mathematics and debate. He is polite, helpful, and well-respected by his peers. I strongly recommend his admission.
